# Oh My Experience

Oh My Experience is a local-first experience layer for AI coding agents. It turns real Codex and Claude work into reviewed experience cards, then recalls the right lessons at prompt time through local hooks.

## Start here

- Overview: /
- Quickstart: /guides/quickstart
- First experience card: /guides/first-card
- Examples: /guides/examples
- Setup: /guides/setup
- Global and project libraries: /guides/project-libraries
- Codex hook: /guides/codex
- Claude hook: /guides/claude

## Core concepts

- Experience card lifecycle: candidate -> draft -> active -> archived.
- `dataDir` is the global library; optional project libraries live at `<project-root>/.oh-my-experience/`.
- Global cards can still be scoped by project metadata without adding files to a repository.
- Prompt-time recall happens through Codex and Claude UserPromptSubmit hooks.
- Retrospectives create candidates; they do not directly create active cards.
- Review stays Markdown-first; candidates do not become active without explicit enabling.
- OME is local-first. Hook runtime does not call an LLM.

- CLI: /reference/cli

- Experience card schema: /reference/card-schema
- Hook events: /reference/hook-events
